name: Eggplant Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the eggplant.
2. Steam the slices until tender.
3. Drain well in a colander.
4. Mash the eggplant to about 1 cup.
5. Beat the egg slightly and stir in the mashed eggplant and remaining ingredients.
6. Drop heaping tablespoonfuls of batter onto a medium hot, well-greased griddle or frying pan.
7. Spread each fritter so it is about 4 inches in diameter.
8. Fry until both sides are well browned. Turn once to ensure even cooking on the other side.
9. Serve immediately. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
(I use a deep fryer instead of a greased griddle to cook the fritters.)
